content.en:
"No matter whether the Ye Heaven Realm God is so powerful or not, a few of us will definitely not be able to kill him!"

Providence Realm Shinto.

The Liuhe Realm God asked, "Heavenly Providence Realm God, what is your suggestion?"

The Heavenly Providence Realm God pondered for a while, and said a plan: "Ask other Realm Gods to kill Ye Heavenly Realm Gods!"

"Other Realm Gods, please?"

The God of the Liuhe Realm thought of something, so he said, "Then the only way to ask the Hades Demon Hall to take action at a great price!"

The Hades Temple, one of the top forces in the realm of the gods of the realm, is extremely powerful and mysterious, and is engaged in the business of killers.

Of course, the Hades Temple has never offended other top forces, so no top force has ever gone all out to deal with the Hades Temple.

Ye Tian was not a member of the top forces, so there was naturally no problem in asking the Hades Demon Hall to take action.

It's just that if you want to ask "Six Seven Zero" to move the Hades Temple, how much price you have to pay, it depends on the price of the Hades Temple.

If the Hades Demon Temple offers any price, if Tianhe Dao Mountain can't take it, the Hades Demon Palace will definitely not make a move.

"Heavenly Providence Realm God, I'll contact the Hades Demon Temple!" said the Liuhe Realm God.

......

Soon after, the gods of the Liuhe Realm were in contact with the Hades Temple.

But the Hades Hall didn't agree immediately, they still needed to investigate Ye Tian's background and strength before they could make a specific offer, if they agreed casually, the Hades Hall would have long since ceased to exist.

After a while, the Hades Temple made an offer, which made Tianhe Daoshan stunned.

"What, the price of the Hades Temple is outrageous!"

The face of the Heavenly Providence Realm God changed drastically.

This time, the Hades Demon Temple actually offered three million Eternal Boundary Stones, where could they get it!

The Eternal Boundary Stone is a common resource of the Realm God, which is very precious, and can be used to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, repair the Eternal Dao Seed, and even suppress the Demon Seed of the Eternal Dao Seed.

Therefore, the Eternal Boundary Stone is used as a currency for trading by the Realm Gods, and it will not really be used for cultivation, if it is used for cultivation, it will be too extravagant.

There are only tens of thousands of Eternal Boundary Stones in the treasure house of Tianhe Dao Mountain, and even ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm can't even take out a Eternal Boundary Stone in their hands, unless they exchange some of the treasures on their bodies for Eternal Boundary Stones.

"I also think this offer is too outrageous!" Liuhe Realm God said: "Our Tianhe Dao Mountain has exchanged a large number of resources and treasures for Eternal Boundary Stones, and we can only exchange them for three million Eternal Boundary Stones. Use all of our Tianhe Dao Mountain's net worth to invite the Hades Demon Hall to kill the Ye Heavenly Realm God, even if we do this, our Tianhe Dao Mountain will be useless!"

"Why is the price of the Hades Temple so outrageous, I remember that the last time the Hades Temple assassinated an Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak realm god, it was rumored that it only received 1 million Eternal Realm Stones!" asked the Heavenly Providence God in confusion.

Liuhe Realm Divine Dao: "I also asked, the answer given by the Hades Temple is that the Ye Heavenly Realm God has the ability of clone, and the Terran Holy Kingdom and the Endless Kingdom Alliance all have clones, and it is impossible to determine which one is the real body, and they must all be killed, so the task is very difficult." Moreover, they believed that Ye Tian's strength was no less than that of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Middle-level Peak Realm Gods, and his potential was even higher than that of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Middle-level Realm Gods, so they were priced at three million Eternal Realm Divine Stones, and these three million Eternal Realm Stones were only the price of a one-time shot, and if the mission failed, they had to be added. "

"Damn, we can't get it out of this way!"

The God of Providence shook his head, but decided to give up.

"Tell the Hades Temple, we give up this mission!"

"Good!"

The God of the Liuhe Realm immediately went to contact the Hades Temple.

But not long after, the gods of the Liuhe Realm brought bad news.

"The Hades Temple said that they paid some price for their investigation, and even if we don't get on this mission, we will have to pay some intelligence costs 1000 Eternal Boundary Stones!"

"The Hades Temple is crazy, we didn't let them do it, they still need a thousand Eternal Realm Stones????"

The gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm had never found the Hades Temple, and they didn't know that there was such a rule.

He just thinks that the Hades Temple is too pitiful!

A thousand Eternal Boundary Stones, this is not an ordinary wealth, Tianhe Dao Mountain can indeed take it, but it will also be distressed!

"Tell the Hades Temple, three hundred Eternal Boundary Stones, do you want love!" said the God of the Heavenly Providence Realm.

Subsequently.

The gods of the Liuhe Realm bargained with the Hades Temple, and in the end they only gave three hundred Eternal Realm Stones...

......

The realm of the gods.

Inside a palace in the Temple of the Underworld.

Two Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak Realm Gods were dealing with this mission incident in Tianhe Dao Mountain.

"Tianhe Daoshan doesn't pay attention to the rules this time, he thinks that this thousand Eternal Boundary Stones is just the cost of intelligence inquiry, this is a secret fee, they don't even want to give a thousand Eternal Boundary Stones. Since they are only willing to give three hundred Eternal Boundary Stones, then there is no need for us to keep it a secret. "

"Indeed, we don't need to keep it secret, contact the Ye Heavenly Realm God, and sell him the information that Tianhe Dao Mountain is going to deal with him at the price of thousands of Eternal Boundary Stones, in short, we can't lose money no matter what kind of business we have!"

"Well, that's it!"

If the gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm knew that they were sold by the Hades Temple in order to have a few hundred Eternal Realm Stones left, they would probably have to regret it!

Terran Holy Country.

A realm god from the Hades Demon Hall came here and secretly saw Ye Tian.

"Who are you?"

Ye Tian saw a realm god in a black robe, this robe was transformed by an eternal realm treasure, which could cover the detection of the realm god, but under the investigation of the copying talent, he still knew the name of the other party.

God of the Underworld!

When he saw this name, he knew the identity of the other party.

Temple of the Dead!

This is the top power!

Suddenly, Ye Tian was a little nervous in his heart.1.3, he was not qualified to provoke the top forces now, otherwise a high-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm would descend, and he would definitely not be able to stop it.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, I'm from the Hades Demon Palace!"

The God of the Underworld directly revealed his origin, and then continued: "There are forces that want our Hades Demon Hall to kill you, of course, our Hades Demon Hall can also refuse. Now, you have a choice, and that is to buy a piece of intel for the price of seven hundred Eternal Boundary Stones, and find out who is on this mission. "

Ye Tian frowned slightly, he knew that he could not buy enough information, but there was no doubt that he would also offend the Hades Demon Palace.

He also has the Eternal Boundary Stone, but there are not many of them, only more than a hundred.

"I only have a hundred Eternal Boundary Stones in my hand, can I use other resources instead?"

Ye Tian asked.
